page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9it.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 16 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.2 GHz. With a single thread per core configuration, this instance delivers dedicated, non-hyperthreaded compute resources. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 4.0 GB per core.

The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, requiring external network-attached storage for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps, facilitating reliable data transfer rates for distributed workloads. The hardware profile is designed for resource density and predictable compute performance, offering qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that require dedicated CPU execution without the overhead of hyperthreading.
Given its balanced memory-to-CPU ratio and dedicated core allocation, the ecs.g9it.4xlarge is suited for general-purpose workloads, application servers, web serving, and moderate database hosting.

The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying on external storage solutions, but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. This hardware profile delivers predictable execution and qualitative cost efficiency for applications requiring dedicated CPU resources. It is suited for general-purpose workloads, application servers, and web serving.
